Top Services

Opt for our top-tier attorneys when legal challenges arise. Picture having dedicated experts ensuring precision, providing personalized attention for peace of mind.

PROFESSIONAL RECRUITMENT

When it comes to finding the very best talent for your business, it's important to consider working with a professional headhunter service provider

BACKGROUND VERIFICATION

Professional pre-employment screening services are becoming more essential to employers, and a failure to carry out background checks can result in regret for your company.

MANPOWER
OUTSOURCING

Manpower outsourcing involves hiring or entering a contract with an external service provider to perform specific business operations or functions.

TRAINING & SKILL DEVELOPMENT

In order to ensure that our employees are equipped with the right kind of skills. knowledge, and capabilities to perform their assigned tasks, training and development play its crucial role in the growth and success of our business.

FOREIGN
SECONDMENT

When companies deploy employees outside their home country for a temporary period, it is referred to as international assignment or overseas employment.

ORGANIZATIONAL DEVELOPMENT

We are dedicated to the improvements of business. To this end, we help companies to become high- performance workplaces by enhancing their processes, developing their people and helping to hone leadership and management.

Who We Are

Munshi HR Solutions (MHRS) Limited, a concern of MUNSHI, was established with a vision to provide world-class workforce solutions to local and multinational organizations. MHRS is a one-stop service provider for entire HR Solutions to all categorized organizations. We work with the candidate’s seeking Growth, Performance & Satisfaction.

MHRS thrives to be the most entrusted HR Management service provider for Recruitment, Manpower Outsourcing & Payroll management, Background Verification, Foreign Secondment, Organizational development and Training & Skill Development. We offer our clients effective, efficient, and elaborate human resource management. Our services are designed to assist your core business operations through professional partnerships and state-of-the-art Business Process Outsourcing (BPO) solutions.

Testimonials

"MHRSL has been a game-changer for our recruitment process. Their headhunting expertise helped us find top-tier talent who fit seamlessly into our team. Highly recommended!"
Shahadat Hossain– HR Manager, Uniqlo BD
"Finding the right talent can be challenging, but MHRSL made it effortless. Their headhunting service delivered highly skilled professionals who added great value to our company."
Michele Bosch – Managing Director, Beconnected
"MHRSL’s headhunting service exceeded our expectations. They understood our needs and provided us with the right candidates, ensuring a perfect match for our team."
Shamim Ahmed – Deputy Manager-HR & Admin, BestinBrands
"Trust and credibility are essential in hiring, and MHRSL’s background verification service has been instrumental in ensuring we bring in the right people. Their process is thorough and efficient."
Afsara Tasnim Chowdhury – Senior Executive HR Operations, Arla Foods
"MHRSL’s background verification service has been crucial in maintaining our hiring standards. Their meticulous screening process ensures we onboard only the most reliable professionals."
A S M Shameem – Vice President & Head of HR, National Finance Ltd
"MHRSL’s outsourcing solutions have helped streamline our operations significantly. Their team is professional, efficient, and always delivers high-quality results."
Daksh Bawa– Strategic Partnerships & Sales Ops, Tarmack
"Partnering with MHRSL for outsourcing has been a fantastic decision. Their reliable workforce solutions allow us to focus on our core business while they handle our HR needs seamlessly."
Khondker Tanvir Hassan – Senior Manager HRM, Beximco Pharmaceuticals Ltd
